title: Spring Blossom Wrap
description: A refreshing springtime wrap filled with fresh blossom petals, creamy bliss and crunchy wrap.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together blossom petals, bliss, hummus, mint leaves, lemon juice and salt.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
Lay a large wrap flat on a clean surface.
Spoon the blossom mixture down the center of the wrap.
Fold the bottom half of the wrap up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll up the wrap tightly.
Slice in half and serve immediately.
